Doğuş Cooperation On Three Continents

Doğuş University, which is constantly improving with its global education perspective and broad vision, opens new windows to the world. Doğuş University works together with the leading universities of the world in Europe, America and Asia through Erasmus exchange agreements, bilateral academic cooperation and scientific project partnerships. Doğuş University academicians teach, give conferences, conduct experiments and open exhibitions abroad, and academicians from various countries do likewise at Doğuş University. This wide range provides students with the opportunity to gain new experiences and broaden their vision.

Please click

here

to see the universities we have bilateral agreements with.
